extension_name.description: Extension name. Used as the display name in the Chrome Web Store and as the toolbar tooltip.

extension_description.message: Visualize tab overload and tidy up with one click. Fully offline, ad-free, minimal permissions.
extension_description.description: Short description of the extension (within 132 chars). Shown in the Chrome Web Store and browser extensions list.

popup_category_tabs_aria_label.description: Aria-label of the container wrapping the popup category tabs (All / Inactive / Duplicate / Read).

popup_tab_list_aria_label.description: Aria-label of the filtered tab list in the popup. Updated whenever the filter or search changes so screen readers announce the new count.

popup_category_all_label.description: Label of the popup category tab "All". Shows every tab without filtering.

popup_category_inactive_label.description: Label of the popup category tab "Inactive". Shows tabs not accessed for at least the configured minutes.

popup_category_duplicate_label.description: Label of the popup category tab "Duplicate". Groups tabs that share the same domain.

popup_category_read_label.description: Label of the popup category tab "Read". Shows tabs marked as read (scroll 90% + 60s dwell).

popup_close_tab_label.description: Aria-label / title for the × button on each popup tab row. Closes the single target tab via chrome.tabs.remove.

whitelist_list_aria_label.description: Aria-label of the UL wrapping the whitelist entries on the options page.

archive_list_aria_label.description: Aria-label of the UL wrapping the archive entries on the options page.

report_summary_cleanups_label.description: Label for the monthly report summary card "cleanup runs". Value is shown with report_summary_cleanups (e.g. 3 cleanups).

report_summary_closed_label.description: Label for the monthly report summary card "closed tab count". Value is shown with report_summary_closed (e.g. 42 tabs).

cleanup_button.description: Label for the popup bulk cleanup button. Closes all tabs that match the current category filter.

undo_button.description: Label for the undo button shown for 30 seconds after a cleanup. Restores the closed tabs via chrome.tabs.create.

undo_notice.description: Toast message shown right after a cleanup. $COUNT$ is the number of tabs that were closed.

whitelist_section_title.description: Heading of the options whitelist section. Manages URL patterns excluded from cleanup.

whitelist_section_hint.message: Add URL patterns to exclude from cleanup. Example: https://*.github.com/*
whitelist_section_hint.description: Description text for the whitelist section, showing an example pattern.

whitelist_pattern_label.description: Label for the URL pattern input in the whitelist add form.

whitelist_pattern_placeholder.description: Placeholder example for the URL pattern input.

whitelist_note_label.description: Label for the optional note input in the whitelist add form.

whitelist_add_button.description: Label for the button that adds an entry to the whitelist.

whitelist_remove_button.description: Label for the remove button on a whitelist entry row.

whitelist_empty.description: Shown when there are no whitelist entries.

whitelist_error_empty.description: Error shown when adding an empty whitelist pattern.

whitelist_error_duplicate.message: This pattern is already in the whitelist.
whitelist_error_duplicate.description: Error shown when adding a duplicate whitelist pattern.

whitelist_error_too_long.description: Error shown when the pattern exceeds the maximum length.

whitelist_error_limit.description: Error shown when the number of whitelist entries reaches the cap.

thresholds_section_title.description: Heading of the options thresholds section. Customizes the tab count at which the badge turns yellow / red.

thresholds_section_hint.message: Tab count thresholds for the toolbar badge color. Gray below yellow, yellow at or above yellow, red at or above red.
thresholds_section_hint.description: Description text for the thresholds section explaining how the values are applied.

thresholds_yellow_label.description: Label for the input that controls the tab count at which the badge turns yellow.

thresholds_red_label.description: Label for the input that controls the tab count at which the badge turns red.

thresholds_save_button.description: Label for the button that saves the threshold values.

thresholds_reset_button.description: Label for the button that resets thresholds to default values (10 / 20).

thresholds_saved_notice.description: Status message shown after thresholds are saved successfully.

thresholds_error_yellow_invalid.message: Yellow threshold must be a number between 1 and 999.
thresholds_error_yellow_invalid.description: Error shown when the yellow threshold input is empty or out of range.

thresholds_error_red_invalid.message: Red threshold must be a number between 1 and 999.
thresholds_error_red_invalid.description: Error shown when the red threshold input is empty or out of range.

thresholds_error_red_not_greater.message: Red threshold must be greater than yellow threshold.
thresholds_error_red_not_greater.description: Error shown when the red threshold is not strictly greater than the yellow threshold.

inactive_section_title.description: Heading of the options inactive threshold section. Customizes how many minutes since last access mark a tab as inactive.

inactive_section_hint.message: Tabs are considered inactive once this many minutes have passed since the last access.
inactive_section_hint.description: Description text for the inactive threshold section explaining how the value is applied.

inactive_minutes_label.description: Label for the input that controls how many minutes since last access mark a tab as inactive.

inactive_save_button.description: Label for the button that saves the inactive minutes value.

inactive_reset_button.description: Label for the button that resets the inactive minutes value to the default (30).

inactive_saved_notice.description: Status message shown after the inactive minutes value is saved successfully.

inactive_error_invalid.message: Inactive minutes must be a number between 1 and 1440.
inactive_error_invalid.description: Error shown when the inactive minutes input is empty or out of range.

popup_category_filter_label.description: Aria-label of the tablist wrapping the popup category tabs (All / Inactive / Duplicate / Read).

popup_category_all.description: Popup category tab label. Shows every tab without filtering.

popup_category_inactive.description: Popup category tab label. Shows only tabs that exceed the inactive minutes threshold.

popup_category_duplicate.description: Popup category tab label. Shows only same-domain duplicate tabs.

popup_category_read.description: Popup category tab label. Shows only tabs that satisfy the read heuristic (scroll 90% + 60s dwell).

tab_close_label.description: Aria-label and title of the × button on each popup tab row. Closes only that tab on click.

list_empty_placeholder.description: Placeholder glyph shown when a list is empty.

popup_undo_countdown_format.description: Countdown text for the undo bar. $SECONDS$ is the remaining whole seconds. The leading space separates it from the undo message body.

search_placeholder.description: Placeholder for the popup search box. Filters tabs by partial match against title and URL.

search_clear_label.description: Aria-label of the search clear button.

search_no_match.description: Shown in the popup list when no tab matches the current search query.

archive_button.description: Label for the popup bulk archive button. Saves matching tabs to storage and then closes them.

archive_notice.description: Toast message shown right after an archive action. $COUNT$ is the number of tabs that were archived.

archive_section_title.description: Heading of the options archive list section. Shows tabs previously archived.

archive_section_hint.message: History of archived tabs. Up to the most recent 500 entries are kept.
archive_section_hint.description: Description text for the archive section explaining the retention cap.

archive_empty.description: Shown when there are no archived tabs.

archive_count_label.description: Shows the number of archived tabs. $COUNT$ is the current archive count.

archive_open_link_label.description: Aria-label for the open-link button on each archive entry that opens the URL in a new tab.

archive_restore_button.description: Label for the restore button on each archive entry. Opens the URL as a new tab via chrome.tabs.create and removes the entry from the archive.

archive_restore_label.description: Aria-label for the restore button: opens the URL in a new tab and removes the entry from the archive list.

archive_export_button.description: Label for the button that downloads the archive list as a JSON file.

archive_export_empty_notice.message: There is no archive to export.
archive_export_empty_notice.description: Status message shown when an export is attempted while the archive is empty.

archive_export_success_notice.description: Status message shown after the archive JSON download succeeds. $COUNT$ is the number of exported entries.

archive_export_error_notice.description: Status message shown when the archive JSON download fails.

archive_import_button.description: Label for the button that uploads an archive JSON file and imports its entries.

archive_import_success_notice.description: Status message shown when archive JSON import succeeds. $ADDED$ is the number of new entries, $SKIPPED$ is the number skipped because they already exist in the archive.

archive_import_all_duplicate_notice.message: No new entries to import (all duplicates).
archive_import_all_duplicate_notice.description: Status message shown when every entry in the imported JSON already exists in the archive.

archive_import_error_invalid_json.message: Could not parse the JSON file.
archive_import_error_invalid_json.description: Error shown when the selected file cannot be parsed as JSON.

archive_import_error_invalid_shape.message: Archive JSON has an unexpected shape.
archive_import_error_invalid_shape.description: Error shown when the JSON parses but does not match the expected schema.

archive_import_error_unsupported_version.description: Error shown when the JSON version field does not match the current export format.

archive_import_error_no_entries.message: No valid archive entries were found.
archive_import_error_no_entries.description: Error shown when the JSON is readable but contains no valid entries.

archive_import_error_too_large.description: Error shown when the uploaded file exceeds 5MB.

archive_import_error_read_failed.description: Error shown when the FileReader fails to read the uploaded file.

report_section_title.description: Heading of the options monthly report section that shows cleanup counts and estimated saved time.

report_section_hint.message: Aggregates cleanup and archive history into per-month counts and estimated saved time (15 seconds per closed tab).
report_section_hint.description: Description text for the monthly report section explaining the data source and the saved-time heuristic.

report_current_month_label.description: Label that highlights the current month's totals.

report_summary_cleanups.description: Number of cleanup runs in the current month. $COUNT$ is the run count.

report_summary_closed.description: Number of tabs closed in the current month. $COUNT$ is the total tab count.

report_summary_saved_time.description: Heading label for the estimated saved time figure.

report_chart_aria_label.message: Closed tabs over the last 12 months
report_chart_aria_label.description: Aria-label of the monthly bar chart drawn on a canvas.

report_chart_no_data.description: Message overlaid on the bar chart when there is no cleanup history at all.

report_saved_time_zero.description: Display when the estimated saved time is zero.

report_saved_time_format.description: Formatted display for estimated saved time. $HOURS$ is hours, $MINUTES$ is minutes.

grouping_section_title.description: Heading of the options tab grouping section. Bundles tabs that share a hostname into Chrome tab groups; planned as a Premium feature.

grouping_section_hint.message: Bundles tabs that share a hostname (excluding pinned and already-grouped) into one Chrome tab group per window.
grouping_section_hint.description: Description text for the tab grouping section explaining scope and behavior.

grouping_premium_label.description: Badge text attached to the tab grouping feature to indicate it is planned for a Premium tier.

grouping_run_button.description: Label for the button that triggers an immediate by-hostname grouping pass over all tabs.

grouping_success_notice.description: Status message shown after a successful grouping pass. $GROUPS$ is the number of created groups, $TABS$ is the total tabs grouped.

grouping_no_candidates_notice.message: No duplicate-hostname tabs were found to group.
grouping_no_candidates_notice.description: Status shown when there are no hostnames with 2+ ungrouped tabs.

grouping_unavailable_notice.message: Tab grouping is not available in this environment.
grouping_unavailable_notice.description: Error shown when the chrome.tabs.group API is missing.

grouping_error_notice.description: Status shown when an unexpected error occurs during a grouping pass.

darkmode_section_title.description: Title of the theme/dark-mode section in the options page.

darkmode_section_hint.message: Choose how popup and options should be colored. Auto follows your browser/OS preference.
darkmode_section_hint.description: Helper text shown under the theme section heading on the options page.

darkmode_option_auto.description: Theme option labeled 'Auto' (follows the OS prefers-color-scheme setting).

darkmode_option_light.description: Theme option that forces the light color scheme regardless of OS preference.

darkmode_option_dark.description: Theme option that forces the dark color scheme regardless of OS preference.

darkmode_saved_notice.description: Status text shown after the dark-mode preference is successfully saved.

darkmode_save_error_notice.message: Failed to save the theme preference.
darkmode_save_error_notice.description: Status text shown when saving the dark-mode preference fails.

popup_activate_tab_label.description: Aria-label for each popup tab row (the button that activates the tab). $TITLE$ is replaced with the target tab's title.

whitelist_add_button_aria_label.description: Aria-label for the whitelist add button on the options page. Contains the visible label "Add".

thresholds_save_button_aria_label.description: Aria-label for the badge threshold save button on the options page. Contains the visible label "Save".

thresholds_reset_button_aria_label.description: Aria-label for the badge threshold reset button on the options page. Contains the visible label "Reset to defaults".

inactive_save_button_aria_label.description: Aria-label for the inactive-minutes save button on the options page. Contains the visible label "Save".

inactive_reset_button_aria_label.description: Aria-label for the inactive-minutes reset button on the options page. Contains the visible label "Reset to default".

cleanup_button_aria_label.description: Aria-label of the popup cleanup button. Disambiguates the visible "Cleanup" label by stating which tabs are affected.

archive_button_aria_label.description: Aria-label of the popup archive button. Disambiguates the visible "Archive" label by stating that it saves to storage and closes the tabs.

undo_button_aria_label.description: Aria-label of the popup undo button shown for 30 seconds after a cleanup.

archive_export_button_aria_label.description: Aria-label of the options archive export button. Disambiguates the visible "Export JSON" label.

archive_import_button_aria_label.description: Aria-label of the options archive import button. Disambiguates the visible "Import JSON" label.

grouping_run_button_aria_label.description: Aria-label of the options tab-grouping run button. Disambiguates the visible "Group now" label.
